summary: Iteration 103 - Penalty and Compensation System: All 11 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. The new financial rules are correctly implemented: late beyond tolerance is penalized like no_show, review_required=False for medium evidence with clear timing, financial_summary is included in appointment detail response, and the FinancialResultSection component renders correctly with proper labels and styling.

backend_pytest: ✅ A. GET /api/appointments/{id} includes attendance_records when attendance_evaluated=True
✅ B. GET /api/appointments/{id} includes distributions when attendance_evaluated=True
✅ C. GET /api/appointments/{id} includes financial_summary when attendance_evaluated=True

✅ D. financial_summary has all required fields (participant_id, outcome, delay_minutes, tolerated_delay_minutes, guarantee_status, penalty_amount, captured, distribution_id, distribution_status, capture_amount_cents, beneficiaries)
✅ E. attendance_records include delay_minutes and tolerated_delay_minutes
✅ F. Outcomes include on_time and late as expected
✅ G. Late participant has penalty info (delay 20min > tolerated 15min)
✅ H. On-time participant has guarantee released (captured=False)
✅ I. review_required=False for clear outcomes (on_time/late with medium evidence)
✅ J. Beneficiaries structure is correct (role, amount_cents)
✅ K. Penalty amounts match capture amounts
frontend_playwright: ✅ Navigate to appointment detail page works
✅ 'Présent' label found for on_time participant (Igaal Hanouna)
✅ Late label 'Retard 20min (tolérance: 15min)' found for late participant (Test Audit)
✅ Penalty amount '-50.00 €' displayed in red for late participant
✅ 'Garantie libérée' text found for on_time participant

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend (evidence_service.py lines 768-802): delay_minutes calculation correctly added to aggregate_evidence return
✅ Backend (attendance_service.py lines 305-345): Medium evidence with clear timing now has review_required=False
✅ Backend (attendance_service.py lines 425-440): Record creation includes delay_minutes and tolerated_delay_minutes
✅ Backend (attendance_service.py lines 600-656): _process_financial_outcomes correctly treats 'late' as penalized (capture + distribution)
✅ Backend (attendance_service.py lines 753-817): _process_reclassification updated for late=penalized transitions
✅ Backend (routers/appointments.py lines 1449-1496): get_appointment enriched with financial_summary, attendance_records, distributions
✅ Frontend (AppointmentDetail.js lines 212-293): FinancialResultSection component correctly implemented with proper labels
✅ Frontend (AppointmentDetail.js line 870): Conditional render when attendance_evaluated=True and financial_summary exists
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Penalty and Compensation System fully tested. Key verified behaviors: (1) Late beyond tolerance (20min > 15min tolerated) is penalized like no_show with capture + distribution, (2) On-time participants have guarantee released, (3) review_required=False for medium evidence with clear timing, (4) GET /api/appointments/{id} includes financial_summary, attendance_records, distributions when attendance_evaluated=True, (5) FinancialResultSection renders with correct labels: 'Présent' for on_time, 'Retard Xmin (tolérance: Ymin)' for late, penalty amount in red, 'Garantie libérée' for on_time. Note: Stripe capture shows 'Capture en cours' because the test data uses dev_mode fake payment method (pm_dev_5400be0a) which cannot be captured in production Stripe.
